body.purpose: Chat messages, document names, button labels, general UI text.

label.purpose: Section headers — KNOWLEDGE BASE, CHUNKS, STATS, LATENCY. All-caps marks structural hierarchy.

small.purpose: Source chips, status feedback, disclaimer text.

mono.purpose: Dev panel only — chunk content, file names, stat values.

heading.purpose: Sidebar title only. One instance per page.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Input focus state only. State indicator, not structural elevation.

motion.name: fast
motion.purpose: Sidebar item hover, kb delete reveal.

motion.name: latency-bar
motion.purpose: Dev panel latency bar width transitions.

motion.name: typing-bounce
motion.purpose: Typing indicator dot bounce, infinite, staggered 200ms.

components.name: Upload Button
components.description: Ghost-to-fill upload trigger. Sidebar, full width.
components.css: .ds-upload-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; padding: 9px 14px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid #7c3aed; background: #ffffff; color: #7c3aed; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-upload-btn:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #7c3aed; color: #ffffff; } .ds-upload-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: default; } .ds-upload-plus { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1; font-weight: 400; }

components.name: Send Button
components.description: Icon-only circle button for submitting a chat message.
components.html: <button class="ds-send-btn" aria-label="Send"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="22" y1="2" x2="11" y2="13"/><polygon points="22 2 15 22 11 13 2 9 22 2"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-send-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; border: none; background: #111111; color: #ffffff; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0; transition: background 150ms, transform 100ms; } .ds-send-btn:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #7c3aed; } .ds-send-btn:active:not(:disabled) { transform: scale(0.93); } .ds-send-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c3aed; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-send-btn:disabled { opacity: 0.35; cursor: default; }

components.name: Source Chip
components.description: Inline citation badge linking to a document page.
components.html: policy.pdf p.4
components.css: .ds-source-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 12px; color: #374151; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; transition: border-color 120ms, color 120ms, background 120ms; } .ds-source-chip:hover { border-color: #7c3aed; color: #7c3aed; background: #f5f3ff; }

components.name: Chat Input
components.description: Pill-shaped text field for the message composer.
components.css: .ds-chat-input { flex: 1; padding: 11px 18px; border-radius: 24px; border: 1.5px solid #e5e7eb; font-size: 14px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; background: #fafafa; color: #111111; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms, background 150ms; width: 100%; } .ds-chat-input:focus { border-color: #7c3aed; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(124,58,237,0.08); } .ds-chat-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; }

components.name: Mode Toggle
components.description: Segmented control for search mode selection (Hybrid / Semantic / Keyword).
components.css: .ds-mode-toggle { display: inline-flex; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 7px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-mode-btn { border: none; border-radius: 0; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 11px; background: #fafafa; color: #6b7280; border-right: 1px solid #e5e7eb; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-mode-btn:last-child { border-right: none; } .ds-mode-btn:hover:not(.ds-mode-active) { background: #f5f3ff; color: #7c3aed; } .ds-mode-btn.ds-mode-active { background: #7c3aed; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 600; } .ds-mode-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c3aed; outline-offset: -2px; }

components.name: User Message Bubble
components.html: What is the refund policy?
components.css: .ds-msg { display: flex; flex-direction: column; max-width: 68%; } .ds-msg-user { align-self: flex-end; align-items: flex-end; } .ds-msg-bubble { padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; white-space: pre-wrap; } .ds-msg-user .ds-msg-bubble { background: #f3f0ff; color: #3b1fa8; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Assistant Message Bubble
components.html: Refunds are issued within 30 days of purchase.
components.css: .ds-msg { display: flex; flex-direction: column; max-width: 68%; } .ds-msg-assistant { align-self: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; } .ds-msg-bubble { padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; white-space: pre-wrap; } .ds-msg-assistant .ds-msg-bubble { background: #f0f0f0; color: #111111; border-bottom-left-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Typing Indicator
components.description: Three-dot animated pulse shown while the assistant is generating a response.
components.css: .ds-msg { display: flex; flex-direction: column; max-width: 68%; } .ds-msg-assistant { align-self: flex-start; } .ds-msg-bubble { padding: 10px 15px; border-radius: 16px; border-bottom-left-radius: 4px; background: #f0f0f0; } .ds-typing { display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; padding: 6px 4px; } .ds-typing span { width: 7px; height: 7px; background: #c4b5fd; border-radius: 50%; animation: ds-bounce 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; } .ds-typing span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; } .ds-typing span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; } @keyframes ds-bounce { 0%, 80%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 40% { transform: translateY(-6px); } }

narrative.overview:
This is a workspace for doing work, not for performing it. Every surface holds back until there is something to show. The sidebar sits silently until there are documents; the chat panel holds a single grounding prompt; the dev panel fills with data only after a query runs. The violet is the only note of personality — used exactly where the interface speaks (buttons, active states, focus rings) and nowhere else.

The system rejects three things explicitly. First, the purple soup: generic SaaS violet splashed on every card, gradient, and hover state — the iris here is rare and therefore meaningful. Second, the dark hacker aesthetic: neon on black, monospace everything, trying to signal technical seriousness by cosplaying a terminal. Third, the tutorial-clone flatness: default white with no spacing rhythm, no considered typography, no hover states.

The tone is the same as the name: dry, confident, and uninterested in impressing you. The execution is what impresses.
keyCharacteristics: Light, not dim — main canvas is white, surfaces step up to fog (#fafafa), never to gray
Violet touches exactly where action lives — no ambient violet, no decorative violet
Tonal depth without shadows — surfaces are differentiated by background color, not elevation
System font rendered with care — weight, size, and letter-spacing carry all hierarchy
Dev panel telemetry as a feature, not an afterthought — latency bars, chunk inspector, session stats are first-class

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Iris (#7c3aed) appears on ≤15% of any given screen. It is used on interactive elements and their states, and nothing else. If a surface feels like it needs more violet, the answer is to remove chrome from the surface, not to add violet.

rules.name: The No-Gradient Rule
rules.body: No color gradients anywhere. Background-clip-text with a gradient is prohibited. Tonal steps in this system come from distinct flat values, not blends.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces sit at rest without shadows. Depth is read from color step (Canvas → Fog → Ash), from borders (Chalk), and from contrast — not from blur and spread. If you reach for box-shadow on a surface, reach harder for a tonal background instead.

rules.name: The System Font Rule
rules.body: No Google Fonts, no font loading. The system font stack renders at native quality, loads at zero cost, and matches the OS context the engineer is already working in. This is not a compromise — it is a choice.

dos: Do use Iris (#7c3aed) only on interactive elements and their states — buttons, focus rings, active toggles, hover confirmations.
Do use tonal background stepping (Canvas → Fog) to create structural depth before reaching for a border.
Do write label text in 10px/700/uppercase with letter-spacing: 0.07em — the size step and tracking carry the hierarchy without a visible divider.
Do use asymmetric border-radius on chat bubbles (border-bottom-right-radius: 4px for user, left for assistant) — this is the only visual convention that marks message origin.
Do show empty states that breathe — a centered Mist paragraph, nothing more.
Do keep the dev panel visible at all times.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for the typing indicator bounce and any future transitions.
donts: Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. Prohibited without exception.
Don't spread Iris (#7c3aed) across backgrounds, dividers, headings, or decorative elements.
Don't use dark backgrounds on any surface.
Don't introduce a second accent color. The palette is Iris + neutrals.
Don't add border-left or border-right stripes (greater than 1px) as color accents on list items or cards.
Don't add any box-shadow to resting surfaces.
Don't make the interface look like a generic SaaS product — rounded cards in a grid, gradient CTAs, purple-on-purple backgrounds.
Don't make it look like a hacker terminal.
Don't add loading states that are purely decorative.
